## Type

- [ ] Question / help needed
- [ ] Idea / suggestion
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other

## Description

Describe your question, idea or feedback clearly.

## What have you tried?

If applicable, describe what you've already tried or looked at (docs, guides, etc.).

## Environment

- **Tool:** (Claude Code, OpenCode, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI, Copilot, etc.)
- **Architecture mode:** (Clean, MVC, MVVM, None)
- **OS:** (macOS, Linux, Windows)

## Additional context

Any screenshots, error logs, or links that help explain your issue.
